programme.title: Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Got Your Goat
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Merry Sprouty Day Part 2
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: Three Peas in a Pod
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team face a trio of Evil Peas when Mummy Pea and Daddy Pea come to visit Evil Pea. They vow to help her take over the supermarket once and for all.

programme.title: The Whistling Badge
programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.title: The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Song of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Wagon Ride
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: Pirates
programme.desc: It's an adventure on the high seas as Bluey, Bingo and Missy play Pirates on the hammock swing, but they'll need to find their courage to withstand storms and whale attacks.

programme.title: Aardvark
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Kalahari Desert, in Southern Africa on a global adventure in search of the elusive aardvark.

programme.title: Aardvark
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Kalahari Desert, in Southern Africa on a global adventure in search of the elusive aardvark.

programme.title: Take Off
programme.desc: Po collects lots of balloons and takes off into the air! Floating high above Teletubbyland, Po waves at Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa‐Laa below. When the balloons pop, Po lands.

programme.title: Shorts
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'shorts' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see all sorts of shorts - red shorts, stripy shorts, kick it really far shorts and flamingo shorts!

programme.title: Space Cucumber
programme.desc: Can there ever be such a thing as too much Messy? OKIDO is about to find out.

programme.title: Dot Pursuit
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to make sure Dot doesn't see her present before her birthday party. But that's easier said than done when Dot becomes an unstoppable present-hunting machine.

programme.title: Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: New Species
programme.desc: The team goes on a jungle expedition to find a mysterious creature. But while they race to discover a brand new species, something seems to be watching them from the treetops.

programme.title: Magic Xylophone
programme.desc: As Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone, Dad seizes control and freezes Bluey, leaving Bingo as her only hope.

programme.title: Featherwand
programme.desc: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: Pizza Girls
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Andy and the Baby Kangaroos
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to Australia on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of why a group of kangaroos, and their joeys, are living on a beach. Along the way, Andy is chased by a pack of dingoes and hops to safety with the baby kangaroos.

programme.title: Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: The Space Badge
programme.desc: Duggee teaches the squirrels all about the stars, the planets and the Milky Way!

programme.title: The Spooky Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing dress up when they hear a ghostly sound. What is going on?

programme.title: The Obstacle Course Badge
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: Great Mosque of Djenne, Africa
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: Kinderdijk, Netherlands
programme.desc: The Go Jetters travel to Kinderdijk in The Netherlands to celebrate National Mill Day.

programme.title: Steam Team to the Rescue
programme.desc: Thomas and the steam trains spring into action when Porter and the diesel engines run into a series of accidents that throw their deliveries off track.

programme.title: Snow
programme.desc: It has snowed and almost no one can get about. Stanley builds a snow plough out of surf boards to clear the streets and makes a huge snow hill so that his friends can sledge down it.

programme.title: Art Park
programme.desc: Fifi and Fred help Stanley clear the park after a storm so it's ready for an Art Competition. The children use the recycled rubbish they found to make their pieces.

programme.title: My Dad Calls My Mum a Badger
programme.desc: Kisses, cuddles, and making renewable energy from cow poo! Parents are brilliant!

programme.title: It's time to make up a story
programme.desc: When JoJo can't find her favourite Captain Chloe storybook, Gran Gran suggests they make up their own story.

programme.title: Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Omelette
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: The Day Off Badge
programme.desc: It's Duggee's day off but the Squirrels show up to tell him about their adventures.

programme.title: The Duck Badge
programme.desc: The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum.

programme.title: Fukuoka 2023 - Episode 1
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Men's Forms Championship
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the CMX Weapons Championship and the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! James Kirkland vs. Eromosele Albert
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the 21-0 James Kirkland facing off with the 21-1 Eromosele Albert. Just a little over a minute into this bout, following a combination of punches, the bout comes to a close.

programme.title: Osaka, Japan: Show 3
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 features Chiyotairyu, Aoiyama, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Houston Finals: Part 1
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Houston Qualifier tackle the Houston Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Walking Bar, Crazy Cliffhanger and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Manon Fiorot
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda "MadDog" Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Carlos Manuel Baldomir vs. Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka 'Tata' (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo 'Thunder' Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jan Zaveck vs. Andre Berto
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features the IBF Welterweight title bout, Jan Zaveck, aka 'Mr. Sympathicus', (31-1, 18 KOs) vs. Andre Berto (27-1, 21 KOs) from Beau Rivage Resort and Casino in Biloxi, Mississippi, USA, on September 3, 2011. Andre Berto, coming off losing the WBC title to Victor Ortiz, was looking for vengeance against Zaveck.

programme.title: Biomechanics of Body Preparation
programme.desc: In this episode we follow one of our martial artists as he goes through a grueling tournament and how he uses technology to help him prepare for it.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: Hague Grand Prix
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.desc: Beneath the earth, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time. From an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths.

programme.title: End Of The Landlines
programme.desc: When Motorola introduces the first handheld portable telephone to the world, the futuristic technology sets off a fierce battle among telecommunications companies to produce the most popular cell phone.

programme.title: Breakout In Plain Sight
programme.desc: An Iranian American psychopath is thrown into city jail in Southern California. Before he gets sent to a higher security prison, he escapes by crawling up the plumbing chase of the five-story prison.

programme.title: The Salem Witch Trials
programme.desc: One of the darkest chapters in early American history. In 1692, fear rips through the town of Salem. Accusations fly, and many people are put to death. But what really sparked the Salem Witch Trials?

programme.title: Astonishing Escapes
programme.desc: We've heard the tales of prison breaks, but these aren't your average escapes. From a man who frees himself all thanks to a fruit to a Soviet pilot that evades capture by stealing the enemy's plane.

programme.title: Where Ark Thou?
programme.desc: In the Bible, there are two Arks, each designed by God himself. Both the Ark of the Covenant and Noah's Ark were built to protect but lost to history. Did either exist, and if so, where could they be?

programme.title: Jumpin' Jake Flash
programme.desc: A set of replica Muppets has Chum feeling green with envy; but will going gonzo over these land him the goods? Meanwhile, Rick flips over an autograph book from the 1800s, but are the signatures the real?

programme.title: Wolfemen Vs. The Automatons
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: Mighty Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles high-kick their way into the action figure market in the late 1980s, opening the door for a new kind of martial arts toy. But their place at the top is soon challenged.

programme.title: American Spirits
programme.desc: Two entrepreneurs rise from the ashes of Prohibition by staking everything on two liquors and go on to save an industry, change cocktail culture, and create two of the most popular brands in the country.

programme.title: Sushi
programme.desc: The sushi episode delves into the story of one of Japan's most popular dishes. The episode examines the history of sushi, from its humble beginning as a method of preserving fish.

programme.title: 新闻今日谈 (3/5/26)
programme.desc: 此节目针对每天最热门的时事话题，在观众最关注的时刻即时作出评论，让观众更洞悉事件的真相。

programme.title: 筑梦天下
programme.desc: 荟萃中外历史建筑，赏析现代经典设计；寻访民居风俗故事，分享另类家居理念。

programme.title: 风云对话
programme.desc: 本访谈节目围绕国际焦点事件，叱咤风云的重量级人物，专访全球政治最关键，最敏感的人物，通过阮次山先生的访问，让重量级人物透露决策内幕，剖析心路历程，分析形势发展。

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云

programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mencari Tahu Isi Hati Cewek Gorengan
programme.desc: Rizky (Hardi Fadhillah) is forced into a shotgun wedding with Syifa (Jennifer Eve) due to a ridiculous misunderstanding: he accidentally entered the ladies' room and was accused of being a pervert. To make matters more 'fragrant,' Syifa is a fried-food vendor with a peculiar habit of farting whenever she pleases

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Salam Santun Akang Satpam Skin Oppa
programme.desc: Prita (Larasati Nugroho) is a Betawi girl obsessed with everything K-Pop. When she meets Jaka (Farhan Rasyid), who has an oriental look, she immediately calls him 'Oppa' and dreams of marrying him. However, her father has other plans, insisting she marry the local guy, Roni (Angga Putra).

programme.title: Dosen Ganteng Bikin Hati Adalah Mawut

programme.title: Kambing Daliman
programme.desc: he story begins with the success of Baskoro, a former film director who has just been elected as the Regent of Klaten. Daliman, a humble porter at Beringharjo Market, is overjoyed to see Baskoro on TV. Years ago, Daliman worked as an extra for Baskoro and even lent his goat to be slaughtered for a movie scene. Baskoro had promised to pay him back if the film succeeded, but unfortunately, the movie was a total failure. Now that Baskoro is in power, will Daliman get what he’s owed

programme.title: Livret A, life insurance: where is our money going?
programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or «sustainable development», the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Chevilly
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chateau de Chevilly reveals its elegant silhouette in the Beauce natural region.

programme.title: Outremer.Story
programme.desc: A journey a world away from the usual tourist hotspots for an immersive visit to Overseas France. Men and women, each treasuring a deep attachment to their land, act as our guides for this unique exploration of Overseas France and all the wealth of its culture, environment and heritage.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: From Rennes to Cotes-d'Armor
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an unusual flea market in Rennes, in Ille-et-Vilaine. In Cotes-d'Armor, she meets a glassblower in her workshop.

programme.title: Livret A, life insurance: where is our money going?
programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or «sustainable development», the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Kaffir Lime (Combava)
programme.desc: Chef Anthony Limery prepares chicken with kaffir lime and plantain.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: From Rennes to Cotes-d'Armor
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an unusual flea market in Rennes, in Ille-et-Vilaine. In Cotes-d'Armor, she meets a glassblower in her workshop.

programme.title: Outremer.Story
programme.desc: A journey a world away from the usual tourist hotspots for an immersive visit to Overseas France. Men and women, each treasuring a deep attachment to their land, act as our guides for this unique exploration of Overseas France and all the wealth of its culture, environment and heritage.

programme.title: The rainmaster
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Crossing the desert
programme.desc: The High Priestess administers a mouthful of her potion to each of the Komians. Ebri Morrow's troops are at the gates of Kumassi. As they reach the pond, they put the final touches to their strategy. Pokou sets off for her third challenge.

programme.title: Scales
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Here is a starfish
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Delphine Boulay Case: Terror at the Scout Camp
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Meurtres a Font-Romeu
programme.desc: Font-Romeu is in shock: Father Baptiste has been murdered. Lieutenant Thomas Errelbaz investigates, but is out of his depth. Newly arrived from Paris, his colleague Julie Delpech is struggling to assert her authority. But she is convinced that a mysterious individual is settling their scores with the past.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Foot! (2/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Petites Danseuses
programme.desc: What is life like for girls who dream of becoming prima ballerinas at the Paris Opera? Aged between six and ten, they dance with passion every day. But it is a real challenge growing up in a world with intensive work, demands and competitions at such a young age.

programme.title: 唐山五虎
programme.desc: 一位功夫师傅与三位门徒被恶霸欺凌，师徒俱败于他拳下。三徒悲愤填膺，分别寻师学艺。半年后，恶霸寿辰之日，三徒连袂回归，誓要与恶霸一较高下！

programme.title: 八国联军
programme.desc: 清朝末年政局腐败，社会民不聊生，慈禧太后与一群愚昧无知的权贵大臣不但毫无抵御外国列强侵占，以及保护人民的能力，反而迷信以吞符念咒，自称无坚不摧的「义和团」可以抵御洋人，决意向列强宣战。结果导致八国联军攻陷北京，慈禧太后仓惶逃难；人民这才醒悟到，只有孙中山先生领导的革命运动，才是挽救中国的唯一希望。

programme.title: 武林圣火令
programme.desc: 尹天仇的父母因一对武林圣火令﻿遭人暗算身亡，他和妹妹分别被忠奸两派收养抚育，兄妹各持一半圣火令，习得绝世武功。起初两人势同水火，却在揭开身世秘密后携手合作，共同为父母报仇雪恨。

programme.title: 舞衣
programme.desc: 歌星白眉有一豪宅，与空姐朱黛、舞女姚姚同住，三女各有爱情际遇；白眉虽爱钱，却倾情自称从外地来的路俊，两人只好互许后会有期之愿；朱黛曾迷恋已婚飞机师，分手后又爱上赛车手；姚姚的最大心愿是把清白之躯留给丈夫，她本最爱穷工人李吉，李吉却因自卑而忍痛分手，姚姚嫁予富家子，却仍挂念李吉...

programme.title: 飞狐外传
programme.desc: 十八年前，胡斐之父胡一刀，与苗人凤交换刀剑比武，被己刀伤，继而身亡，原来胡之刀早被田归农涂上毒药；苗妻南兰被田勾引，竟抛夫弃女，后田更以毒粉弄瞎苗双眼；斐见苗受此遭遇，决定代其向药王求救，亦因此碰上一生中最爱的药王传人程灵素......

programme.title: 七十二家房客
programme.desc: 七十二家房客租住一幢旧式的庭院，终日受泼辣的女房东和她卑鄙的丈夫的欺压。一名勇于发声的新房客出现，改变了租客的命运。他们合力对抗逼迁、抵制贪警，最终成功不让房东出售家园。

programme.title: 十八般武艺
programme.desc: 雷公为救弟子，不惜将他掌管的云南义和团分舵解散，并隐居乡间。义和团委派数名杀手追杀叛徒雷公，但反被雷公消灭。雷公的弟弟雷勇被派往先找出哥哥的下落，然后再将他杀死。最后，兄弟二人反目，决战定生死。

programme.title: 花田错
programme.desc: 故事讲述千金小姐刘月英与丫鬟春兰同游花田盛会，邂逅桥边画画的落拓书生卞济。春兰眼见小姐芳心暗许，于是穿针引线，欲促成良缘，却因老家仆错认小霸王周通为卞济，使小姐与卞济情路波折重重。在经过一连串误会与错配后，结局乃皆大欢喜。

programme.title: 街市英雄
programme.desc: 本片讲述洪熙官被投靠清廷之武林败类高进忠追杀，身受重伤，市井英雄朱才、陈阿全、梁天宝安排洪藏身于豆腐店中，并为他买药治伤。高进忠探得洪藏身之处，暗嘱手下广布眼线，以便将洪一举成擒...

programme.title: 梁上君子
programme.desc: 本片为徐虾导演。 董骠, 钱小豪及蒋金饰扒手, 惟董失手被捕; 董出狱后装南洋阔客, 随钱及蒋返家, 因为想扮相古怪, 惹途人围观, 三人乘机施妙手, 更向盘问的保安队长罗莽自诩身份特殊, 使罗躬身谢罪...

programme.title: 浣花洗剑
programme.desc: 太湖决战前夕，白水宫主人被东瀛剑客所伤。于是，他嘱咐其弟宝玉代寻找解药。途中宝玉偶遇关外的小公主，二人一见钟情。但原来小公主的背后却隐藏着一个重大阴谋...

programme.title: 一乐也
programme.desc: 由三个民初故事串联而成的喜剧小品，许冠文一人分饰多角，其中包括剃头学徒：有一街坊中风而死，许代师傅守灵，为打发时间与众人在灵堂玩起「麻雀耍乐」，怎料尸体突然触电翻生！

programme.title: 帮规
programme.desc: 故事描述，元初元人派大将军莽依图打击反元分子；反元联盟潜龙帮正处外忧内患，伏帮主、石副帮主双双去世，继任人伏中原又为石夫人持信证明为元人，中原遂私下追寻身世真相。期间中原往将军府盗取结盟名册时，几乎遇险，幸为女飞贼林雪儿所救...

programme.title: 宝莲灯
programme.desc: 这是一个耳熟能详之中国民间神话故事，讲述书生刘彦昌巧遇落入凡间的圣母三娘，二人一见钟情，结下一段仙凡姻缘。但因与二郎神结怨，屡遭迫害，二郎神更将圣母压在华山底下。彦昌与圣母之子沉香长大后，闻悉生母被压华山，悲愤欲绝，藉神斧之助挫败二郎神，劈山救母。

programme.title: 大醉侠
programme.desc: 女侠「金燕子」的兄长被山贼掳走，幸得武功高强的「醉侠」范大悲相助，从作恶多端的寺庙主持手上救出兄长。本片曾代表香港出战第39届奥斯卡金像奖最佳外语片的首轮评选。

programme.title: 花团锦簇
programme.desc: 时装设计师史马哥向叶德梅征求她对自己作品的意见，梅却随意提出批评，这让马哥感到非常不满。一天，梅准备出席一场盛大的宴会，于是找马哥为她设计礼服，不料他为报复故意设计了一件小丑装，让梅颜面尽失。最终，史马哥却很内疚并向梅道歉，两人冰释前嫌，并坠入爱河。

programme.title: 龙虎少爷
programme.desc: 执到宝为武功了得的寻宝专家，因闻招九积自称有张保仔宝藏之线索，乃往赌场将其救出；招云古董商人鲁古董藏有张生前一批信札，执、招夜窃不遂，以敲碎古玩要胁，取得信札；惟信札字迹陈旧，仅认清法华寺字样；彼时适逢高僧无相下山，执遂假扮疯僧约无相谈禅，招则暗闯其房搜寻秘密...

programme.title: 乌龙济公
programme.desc: 济公与修道成仙的吕洞宾斗智斗法，二人使出浑身解数，不论是笑声、法力、风流韵事，甚至乎兵器，双方都不惜一切对决到底！

programme.title: 金燕子
programme.desc: 白衣大侠和黑色醉侠同时爱上女侠金燕子。三人却联手对付江湖中的恶势力。在一场生死对决展开前，金燕子还是迟迟未能作出自己感情的抉择。

programme.title: 女巡按
programme.desc: 影后李菁的代表作，萧湘反串文必正，倾慕官府小姐霍定金，卖身混入霍家，二人私定终身，必正被陷害入狱，定金设法营救...

programme.title: 五虎将
programme.desc: 一帮土匪带着劫来的保险箱到某小镇，迫铁匠韦开箱，韦却逃走报官。匪帮滥杀村民，多名义士闻讯，联手对抗众匪。

programme.title: 万花迎春
programme.desc: 歌舞团台柱陈君迈赋闲多时后，应征当富家女梅倩如的司机，竟被误传恋情。倩如为查明流言的来源，假扮记者采访歌舞团，期间君迈与倩如暗生好感，经过一番试探后，二人终一舞定情。

programme.title: 暗渠
programme.desc: 故事讲述侦缉警长赵敬才因一次行动，连累下属被劫匪击毙，而被上司指责处事鲁莽，改派督察邱正明接办案件。敬才与正明办案作风迥异，冲突日多。职业杀手利子健受雇来港狙杀殷商徐文，岂料行动时却误中副车，仅杀死徐文之助手；当徐文查得杀手为子健后，急欲除之。警方接获线报，即派正明与敬才率队出发，阻止黑帮火拼......

programme.title: 包剪石沓
programme.desc: 幽默风趣的爱情喜剧，三个年青医生常开道、史瑞科、萧而可，被安排追求院长的三个女儿灵珍、灵珊、灵玲。三人以「包、剪、搥」来决定追求对象，他们的追女桥段层出不穷，用尽英雄救美、苦肉计、死缠烂打等爱情药方，却全部失灵，乌龙百出...

programme.title: 五虎屠龙
programme.desc: 高氏五兄弟，少时家遭巨变，流离失散。长大后，各有际遇，不知杀父仇人就是无恶不作的腾龙庄主。但五兄弟各自均不满腾龙庄欺凌弱小之所作所为，并誓要除魔。当五兄弟重逢后，他们一起努力练功，准备与腾龙庄庄主及其帮会一战。

programme.title: 邪斗邪
programme.desc: 余腩沉溺赌海，由于欠债累累无力偿还，遂答应债主以其妻肉偿债项。事件被其妻识破，并决意离余而去。余动轻生念头，可最终自杀未遂。余遇上一名富家老伯，老伯答应给余巨额现金，只要余答应帮他娶得美人归...

programme.title: High Rollers
programme.desc: Mason's crew is forced to pull off a dangerous heist for a powerful criminal, with the FBI chasing them and a family feud threatening their lives.

programme.title: Caddo Lake
programme.desc: The disappearance of an eight-year-old girl sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Faced with an impending threat unlike others, Hiccup and Toothless battle to protect all that they love with a female Light Fury as they travel to a mythical hidden world.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: An endearing American family is pitted against a terrifying and uncanny opponent: doppelgängers of themselves.

programme.title: No Reservations
programme.desc: Catherine Zeta Jones stars as a chef with a fiery temper struggling to care for her orphan niece and manage the handsome new sous chef.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: In this new take on the tragic love story, a seasoned musician discovers and falls in love with a struggling artiste.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: In the town of Stepford, Nicole Kidman and Matthew Broderick find that all the women are perfect - a little too perfect.

programme.title: Maachis
programme.desc: Jaswant is arrested for a crime he did not commit. On seeing his friend's condition, Kripal joins an extremist group to bring down the government.

programme.title: Love Break Up Zindagi
programme.desc: A couple and many of their friends experience changes and challenges in their respective lives after attending a wedding.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez Kgf: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Anari
programme.desc: A rich girl appoints a simpleton, as her bodyguard. She soon falls in love with him, which creates havoc in his life.

programme.title: Karm
programme.desc: Asha and Arvind live together and soon start making plans for the new addition in the family. What she does not know is that Arvind has met a young woman named Neelam Shukla who wants to marry him.

programme.title: Bewakoofiyaan
programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air?

programme.title: Saiyaara
programme.desc: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

programme.title: Rathnan Prapancha
programme.desc: Rathnakara is a middle-class man in his late twenties who is unhappy with his life choices. One day, he gets a startling call that turns his world upside down.

programme.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkar
programme.desc: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up. However, life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

programme.title: Saajan Chale Sasural
programme.desc: A village-based singer attempts to find love and fame in the big city.

programme.title: Chandigarh Kare Aashiqui
programme.desc: Manu, a bodybuilder from Chandigarh, India, falls in love with Maanvi, a Zumba teacher. All seems well until a revelation causes turmoil in their love story.

programme.title: Dhool Ka Phool
programme.desc: Mahesh and Meena fall in love but he marries another girl at his father's behest. When Meena takes their baby to Mahesh, he rejects her saying their relationship was a mistake.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
programme.desc: Raj, Pooja and Jhanvi are in a complicated love triangle. Pooja and Jhanvi love Raj. Raj loves Jhanvi but is misunderstood as Pooja's husband by their family. How will the confusion clear off?

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiya 3
programme.desc: Rooh Baba steps into a spooky estate and faces two mysterious spirit, both claiming to be Manjulika.

programme.title: Bairaag
programme.desc: Manservant Bhola is secretly in love with his master's granddaughter but she is set to wed another. But the dowry-demanding groom absconds with the money and Bhola is sent to bring him back.

programme.title: Style
programme.desc: Best friends Bantu and Chantu try make two wealthy girls fall in love with them. However, they find out that the girls have been murdered and become prime suspects.

programme.title: Arjun Patiala
programme.desc: Arjun Patiala is a quirky small-town cop, who is fond of women and even more fond of his drinks. His original and unusual ideas help reduce crime rate in the town.

programme.title: Saala Khadoos
programme.desc: The story of a former boxer who quits boxing following a fallout with the authorities but goes on to coach a fisherwoman to fulfill his dream through her. Starring Madhavan.

programme.title: Hit- The First Case
programme.desc: A brilliant but troubled police inspector sets out to solve a confounding case, all while fighting to gain clarity into his troubled past.

programme.title: Aetbar
programme.desc: Dr. Ranveer tries to stop Ria, his daughter, from pursuing a romantic relationship with Aryan, an unpredictable and possessive man. She does not heed her father's words and continues dating him.

programme.title: The Case Of The Diabolo
programme.desc: Noddy's delighted to be given a diabolo by Big Ears. But when Noddy tries it out for the first time, the diabolo crashes and breaks in two. Even worse, when Noddy goes to retrieve the two halves, he finds that they're both missing! Noddy needs to investigate. Where is his new toy?

programme.title: The Case Of The Vanished Trophy
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings invites the toys to play a game of Catch the Flag at the castle. But when the special trophy goes missing, Noddy has to investigate. Where is the vanished trophy?

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Cows
programme.desc: When Train hears cows near the railway tracks, he's worried that he might scare them and he insists on going really slow. Trouble is there's a load of Builders on board who need to get to Brickabuild fast. Noddy decides to investigate. Where are the lost cows?

programme.title: The Case Of The Burst Tyres
programme.desc: There's a race at the loop-the-loop. Deltoid brings the prize for the winner: a beautiful model of the loop the loop circuit made by Pat Pat and Smartysaurus. All the toys are very excited, but before the race starts the tyres of Deltoid's tribike are burst! Could it be one of the contestants trying to prevent him from winning the race? Noddy needs to find out so that the race can take place.

programme.title: Why Rhino Charges
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Rhino didn't charge and he couldn't see very well at all. Poor old Rhino really wanted to be invited to the Dance of the Horns up on the plains with Buffalo and all the other horned animals. But Rhino didn't have a horn, so he wasn't allowed. The Monkeys decide to help Rhino and make him a horn from a piece of old wood. But when Rhino wakes up he doesn't know what it is. ‘Aargh! Thing on the end of my nose! CHAAaarge!' And that's Why Rhino Charges.

programme.title: Why Caterpillar Is Never In A Hurry
programme.desc: You see Caterpillar was never in a hurry. When all the animals were racing around Tinga Tinga getting ready for the Best-dressed parade, Caterpillar was happy to sit in a tree and munch on leaves saying ‘Po-le, po-le, slowly, slowly, good things come to those who wait'. Then one day the rains come and Caterpillar disappears into a cocoon. ‘What's happening?' questions Elephant. ‘Wait and see' says Tortoise wisely ‘Wait and See'.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Flying Shark
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off...

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Blue Flash
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all...

programme.title: Roary's Demolition Derby
programme.desc: Roary is in a mischievous mood and keeps crashing into things. Big Chris has a great idea how Roary can burn up all his energy and be helpful at the same time!

programme.title: Manners Please
programme.desc: Farmer Green and FB are very nervous about going to Mama Mia's garden party. James and the other cars offer to teach them how to behave at such an event. But everything doesn't quite go to plan…

programme.title: Big Chris' Big Jump
programme.desc: Big Chris has agreed to do a parachute jump for charity but loses his nerve on the big day. Can Roary talk him through it, just like Big Chris did for him when he got scared?

programme.title: Brassless Bandfinal
programme.desc: The brass band booked for the Silver Hatch parade have cancelled. Mr Carburettor will be furious if he doesn't have music at his parade. Roary and his friends think up an ingenious plan...

programme.title: Somewhere / Over the Rainbow
programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. Kelp tells his family he’s a unicorn. / Kelp returns to Unicorn Land where he meets Pixie and Juniper, who show him around and introduce him to unicorn spark and magic.

programme.title: Tacos / Rainy Day
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.title: Welcome to Harmony Harbor
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: The Cleat without Feet / Real Magic
programme.desc: When Phoebe accidentally knocks Harper's soccer cleat off the balcony before the big game, the Dew Drops must venture into the city to retrieve the cleat. / When Dylan starts practicing magic tricks, Athena thinks his magic is real! But when the Dew Drops investigate his "magic hat," they accidentally break it and must fix it before Dylan’s magic show for the neighborhood kids.

programme.title: Welcome to Pawston \ Ruff Day on the Job
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Dark Park Bark Lark \ The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. But when Tag and Scooch show up at the racetrack, there’s lots of competition. And to complete the first challenge - a pedal car race - they’re going to have to work together.

programme.title: Fluffy Flufferton
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Best Friends Day / The White Whale
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Shark and Pilot Fish / Theo
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.title: Sawmetrodon
programme.desc: Ty, Revvit and the crew save a band of Woodland Reptools from an evil and destructive Sawmetradon named Splitter who refuses to join the Trux team.

programme.title: Lucky and the Railroad Ransom
programme.desc: When Butch LePray hold Jim for ransom, Lucky and Spirit team up with the unlikeliest of allies to get her father back

programme.title: Wednesday
programme.desc: Just before her 15th Birthday. Princess Cleopatra is zapped thirty thousand years into the future where she discovers that she is the prophesied savior of the galaxy.

programme.title: Surprise
programme.desc: Cleo tries to find her place at the Academy, unaware that Akila is planning a surprise birthday party for her.

programme.title: Gran Day Out
programme.desc: When Gran moves into the cave with The Croods, she drives Grug nuts and embarrasses Eep in front of the first-ever group of cool kids.

programme.title: School Of Hard Rocks
programme.desc: When teamed up with her new friend Lerk, Eep's competitive side takes over when she sets out to win the first-ever school hunting exam at any cost.

programme.title: How to Start a Dragon Academy
programme.desc: Hiccup is given the responsibility to integrate dragons into the village of Berk and must contend with his rowdy friends, unruly dragons and an upset village elder.

programme.title: Viking For Hire
programme.desc: Now that dragon-killing is no longer necessary, Hiccup tries to find a new job for Gobber the Blacksmith, but the task proves harder than expected.

programme.title: Enemy Of My Enemy
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Crash Course
programme.desc: When a dangerous subterranean Cavern Crasher dragon invades the Fireworm Queen's underground nest, she approaches the Riders on Dragon's Edge for help.

programme.title: Follow The Leader
programme.desc: When Fishlegs discovers a hidden civilization of Albino Night Terrors beneath Dragon's Edge, he must craft an escape plan after they attack the Riders.

programme.title: Yellow 100
programme.desc: Finally promoted to CEO, Boss Baby sets his sights on achieving 100% Baby Love, while dealing with the annoying Puppies and Preeks who rented Baby Corp office space while Boss was gone. Tim and Danny become local heroes after saving a baby's life.

programme.title: Pyg & Tam
programme.desc: Boss Baby encounters a new threat to Baby Love: an adorable Baby TV show starring Pyg the Pygmy Goat, Tam the Tamandua, and their host Maria-Maria. Boss is told not to go to Corporate War by Board Baby Emiliano, so Boss tries to provoke his enemies to make the first move.

programme.title: Conference Room B
programme.desc: Boss promises Tim he'll help make their parents' anniversary present, but after Puppy Co. and Baby Corp's fight over a conference room escalates, he sends Hendershot is his stead. Hendershot, armed with a file on all of Tim's wants and needs, tries to keep Tim happy.

programme.title: Captain Underpants And The Senseless Torment Of The Space Toilet
programme.desc: Inspired by their favorite TV show, George and Harold - along with Principal Krupp - blast off to outer space, where an angry toilet awaits.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Abandoned Artifact of the Absentee Aliens
programme.desc: After George and Harold learn the truth about their mission, Dupe Licitous enlists the entire crew in a quest to repair a rogue satellite.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Hazardous Hysteria of the Hangry Hypnosinger
programme.desc: Everybody on the spaceship has been cryogenically frozen for three months - everyone, that is, except Krupp, who's wide awake and happily in charge.

programme.title: Turn And Burn
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Buffalord Soldier
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: A Grim Retreat
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon Master
programme.desc: After absorbing the mystical Hero Chi of the Four Constellations, four panda kids enlist the Dragon Master to teach them Kung Fu

programme.title: Blue Dragon Plays with Fire
programme.desc: When the kids grow over-confident after beginning their training, they decide to intercept a distress call and sneak off without permission, only to land themselves in hot water

programme.title: Blade of the Red Phoenix
programme.desc: Po and the kids are recruited to perform in Mei Mei's theatrical show, but things take a turn when Jindiao ruins the play in order to find a mystical scroll

programme.title: Becoming Part 1
programme.desc: An average high school student, Jim Lake, yearns for adventure and he gets more than he bargained for when he inherits the mantle of Trollhunter after the previous Trollhunter is killed

programme.title: Becoming Part 2
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Wherefore Art Thou Trollhunter?
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: The Bedouin Shield
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up.

programme.title: The Eye of the Sahara
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月与慧云的关系逐渐拉近，得悉慧云正在做怀孕准备。基俊冷待慧云，却与情人朱祖娜打得火热。慧云为了怀孕，找来永源帮忙向祖娜埋手，成功偷取基俊的精液来做人工受孕。柏中发现永源的踪影，忍不住上前拦截，更夺走了慧云付给永源的报酬。永源满腔怒火找上满月报复，以曦晨作胁，要求满月偿还原本属于他的金钱。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱新来的医生张志明精明能干，深得一妍赏识，一妍更委任他为肺肝同步移植手术的换肝主刀医生。以珈向董事会成员杏芳与袁添维争取主席之位的选票，却不果。一妍的腕管综合症越来越严重，但她为了手术可如期进行而隐瞒病情。原来当年一妍曾收到匿名告密信，指多年前立万有份执刀的肺肝同步移植手术，是因负责肝移植部份的杨旭川医生失误导致病人死亡

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明闯入叶凌霜的闭关处，发现她在尝试解开封印并陷入了幻境。叶凌霜被唤醒后对彧修明大发雷霆，责怪他利用夜北百姓作为牺牲品。随后，叶凌霜被彧修明打入天牢，但很快又被放出并恢复职位。在朝堂上，彧修明借叶凌霜之口警示朝臣，并定下规矩。后来彧修明邀请叶凌霜陪同巡狩，最初被拒绝，但叶凌霜在得知七海伶未死的消息后改变主意，并成功说服彧修明让她随行。

programme.title: Dallas Open
programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the Ford Center at The Star, Dallas.

programme.title: ABN Amro Open
programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the one of biggest and most prestigious sports events in the Netherlands.

programme.title: Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) Final
programme.desc: The Open de Rouen is a professional women’s tennis tournament on the WTA Tour, established in 2022 and held at the Kindarena in Rouen, France. The tournament offers over $275,000 in total prize money and features top international talent.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Madrid, Spain. It is played on outdoor clay courts at the Caja Mágica and is a key tournament in the European clay-court swing, often considered a crucial precursor to Roland-Garros.

programme.title: Episode 40
programme.desc: Catch all the happenings in and around the world of badminton here on the show Badminton Unlimited.

programme.title: Day 16 Afternoon Session: Final (8)

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 满月与慧云的关系逐渐拉近，得悉慧云正在做怀孕准备。基俊冷待慧云，却与情人朱祖娜打得火热。慧云为了怀孕，找来永源帮忙向祖娜埋手，成功偷取基俊的精液来做人工受孕。柏中发现永源的踪影，忍不住上前拦截，更夺走了慧云付给永源的报酬。永源满腔怒火找上满月报复，以曦晨作胁，要求满月偿还原本属于他的金钱。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱新来的医生张志明精明能干，深得一妍赏识，一妍更委任他为肺肝同步移植手术的换肝主刀医生。以珈向董事会成员杏芳与袁添维争取主席之位的选票，却不果。一妍的腕管综合症越来越严重，但她为了手术可如期进行而隐瞒病情。原来当年一妍曾收到匿名告密信，指多年前立万有份执刀的肺肝同步移植手术，是因负责肝移植部份的杨旭川医生失误导致病人死亡

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明闯入叶凌霜的闭关处，发现她在尝试解开封印并陷入了幻境。叶凌霜被唤醒后对彧修明大发雷霆，责怪他利用夜北百姓作为牺牲品。随后，叶凌霜被彧修明打入天牢，但很快又被放出并恢复职位。在朝堂上，彧修明借叶凌霜之口警示朝臣，并定下规矩。后来彧修明邀请叶凌霜陪同巡狩，最初被拒绝，但叶凌霜在得知七海伶未死的消息后改变主意，并成功说服彧修明让她随行。

programme.title: 校墓处

programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 唐人街探案2
programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: Sweet Child o' Mining
programme.desc: Shawn gets his first taste of the shifting seabed. Ken tries a new perspective to find new ground.

programme.title: Winter's Fortune: Trapped
programme.desc: Dave Turin prospects virgin ground on a snow-covered claim in Idaho. Fred Lewis explores an underground river in search of gold.

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive
programme.desc: The reckless driver of an 18-wheeler wreaks havoc in Texas. Plus, a man goes on the run after allegedly stabbing a doctor in Florida.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Battle Plan
programme.desc: Shawn and Ken are neck and neck to win their $130K wager as the frigid end approaches with some dangerous winds that threaten Shawn's wash-plant installation.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Fat Truck And A Prayer
programme.desc: Jared counts on a new driver to boost production at the Forever Claim and keep John Mohammed's hands off Float Camp.

programme.title: Valentine's Day Murder
programme.desc: A mother of two turns up dead after a house fire but her autopsy reveals death by strangulation.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Shift Happens
programme.desc: As the miners look to find more valuable ground, Shawn must fight the sea's shifting tide, Ken strains his excavator arm when digging hard cobble.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Brazil Vw Sp2
programme.desc: In Sao Paulo, the boys buy a Brazilian designed VW SP2. It's a dream come true for Mike, but the car lacks power and Elvis has to give it some brawn.

programme.title: Barnstorming For Dollars
programme.desc: In a modern-day treasure hunt, Matt Paxton and his team gamble on finding rare, potentially valuable items buried inside cluttered, filthy homes.

programme.title: Grave Diggers
programme.desc: With time running out, Dustin must make an impossible call: decide whether to keep going at The Wall or abandon the site and start over.

programme.title: No Off Days
programme.desc: Parker's season rides on a critical decision on which ground to open next. Doumitt designs a new gold coin, and Parker cashes in a pile of gold.

programme.title: Darwin's Law
programme.desc: While captains do their best to stay their course, greenhorn problems, mechanical malfunctions and bad fishing conspire to shake their resolve.

programme.title: Against The Law
programme.desc: The King fleet grows desperate as it hurtles towards the finish line and the Wizard's fishing strategy lands them on the wrong side of law.

programme.title: On The Rocks
programme.desc: As crews prepare to head to the Bairdi grounds, a mayday call from a sinking ship prompts a dramatic at-sea rescue.

programme.title: Portugal Mini Moke
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis head to sun drenched Portugal where the iconic Mini Moke has earned cult status. It's a car with a very special place in Mike's heart.

programme.title: Deadliest Bite
programme.desc: Using cutting edge technology, scientists unveil the secrets of rare shark species' jaws and delve into how these sharks deliver lethal attacks.

programme.title: Time Travel To Level Up
programme.desc: Matt hunts for "Back to the Future" self-lacing sneakers worth $100,000, limited-edition hip-hop tour jackets, and rare Olympic memorabilia.

programme.title: Parker Comes Calling
programme.desc: Kevin is sent reeling when Parker shows up demanding the money he's owed. Parker discovers he's losing gold from a wash plant on Dominion Creek.

programme.title: The Beginning Of The End
programme.desc: Dustin hits rock bottom after abandoning The Wall. The crew discovers a new site, The Golden Straits, igniting a frantic race for season-saving gold.

programme.title: Storm Watch
programme.desc: Winter storms are set to rage up from the Southern Ocean with the potential to halt all abalone diving for weeks.

programme.title: Deadliest Bite
programme.desc: Using cutting edge technology, scientists unveil the secrets of rare shark species' jaws and delve into how these sharks deliver lethal attacks.

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 流行经典50年
programme.desc: 中外乐坛历年来诞生无数金曲，不论什么年代的作品，皆各有知音人。《流行经典50年》邀请原唱人或实力歌手，再次演绎这些流行一时，兼且跨越多代的经典，为乐迷带来高质素的音乐享受。

programme.title: Danielle Redlick
programme.desc: Stay-at-home mom Danielle Redlick was arrested and charged with 2nd Degree Murder and Tampering with Physical Evidence in the death of her husband, pro sports executive Michael Redlick.

programme.title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: The Cost Of Happiness
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: Big Island Blow Out
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Pimps
programme.desc: Take a peep into prostitution in Hong Kong, where it is legal, and Mongolia, where there is an estimated one prostitute for every 160 people.

programme.title: Human Traffickers
programme.desc: Illegal dealers, helpless victims, and authorities reveal the lucrative business of selling people in Cambodia, Thailand and Malaysia.

programme.title: A Mother's Betrayal
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the murder of a 42-year-old New Orleans native, who was gunned down in his truck on a stormy night.

programme.desc: Stay-at-home mom Danielle Redlick was arrested and charged with 2nd Degree Murder and Tampering with Physical Evidence in the death of her husband, pro sports executive Michael Redlick.

programme.title: The Cost Of Happiness
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: Murder At The Parish
programme.desc: The Sheriff's Office in DeRidder, Louisiana, receives a distressing phone call from the owner of Dee's Motel. The man tells them that he's found a woman dead in room 6.

programme.title: The Deltona Family Murders
programme.desc: When a young mother and her two children vanish after a violent argument fuelled by jealousy, a Florida community fears they may have crossed paths with a killer closer to home.

programme.title: Deadly Last Steps
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses in on her estranged husband and her boyfriend. An unexpected digital clue has one of them confessing to the murder.

programme.title: Big Island Blow Out
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Pimps
programme.desc: Take a peep into prostitution in Hong Kong, where it is legal, and Mongolia, where there is an estimated one prostitute for every 160 people.

programme.title: Human Traffickers
programme.desc: Illegal dealers, helpless victims, and authorities reveal the lucrative business of selling people in Cambodia, Thailand and Malaysia.

programme.title: A Mother's Betrayal
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the murder of a 42-year-old New Orleans native, who was gunned down in his truck on a stormy night.

programme.title: On Camera & No Road Home
programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: Chris Turner
programme.desc: Chris Turner sits for a high-stakes polygraph test in the hopes of ending suspicions surrounding the infamous 1984 murder of Catherine Fuller.

programme.title: Kerry Lynn Dalton
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene "Melanie" May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: Fighting For The Kids
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: The Death Of Lavender Doe
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: John (Part B)
programme.desc: Local code enforcement has warned John repeatedly about property violations. With the Hoarders team’s help, he must finally clean up or face enforcement action that could cost him everything.

programme.title: Theodore Edgecomb
programme.desc: During a road rage incident, Theodore Edgecomb shoots and kills immigration lawyer Jason Cleereman. Charging him with 1st-degree intentional homicide, the state contends it was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Murderous Cop Or Innocent Gunman?
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer shoots a man in the chest after a social event explodes into a deadly argument between the two men.

programme.title: Masked Attacker Or Mistaken Identity?
programme.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi?

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 校墓处
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】纳兰中学自十年前一场大火后，墙上出现无法洗刷的人形污迹，夜半歌声四起，鬼怪传说不断。某日，三名男生被派到这所女校寄宿，青春萌动的他们不顾校规偷偷恋爱，却意外启动了隐藏十年的追魂诅咒，违反校规者，将被神秘出现的校务处吞噬，灵魂永远封印墙中 。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 偶然遇见的你
programme.desc: 剧情讲述进行时空旅行寻找过去连环杀人真相的尹海俊（金东旭饰）和想要阻止父母结婚拯救妈妈的白允英（秦基周饰）因偶然相遇而受困于1987年，竟然意识到彼此目标之间有关联。

programme.title: 妻子的浪漫旅行6
programme.desc: 一档以爱与理解为精神内核的夫妻对话真人秀。四对夫妻通过这趟旅行学习和借鉴其他夫妻的相处之道，让夫妻重新审视彼此关系，学会换位思考，达到治愈婚姻的目的。

programme.title: 星空下的仁医
programme.desc: 二十年前一宗手术，令两名儿科专科实习医生况丛昕（马国明饰）与许甘枫（郑嘉颖饰）决裂。 时日过去，由于一个特殊的移植手术，他们在安妮公主医院重聚。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.desc: 唐仁（王宝强饰）为巨额奖金欺骗秦风（刘昊然饰）到纽约参加世界名侦探大赛，比赛的内容是寻找杀害纽约唐人街教父七叔的孙子的凶手。两人再次组合侦破案件，并冒着生命危险闹翻纽约。

programme.title: 长相思第一季
programme.desc: 流落大荒的皓翎王姬小夭 历经百年颠沛之苦，在清水镇成为悬壶为生的玟小六，机缘之下与玱玹, 涂山璟, 相柳, 阿念, 赤水丰隆等人上演了一场亲情, 爱情, 友情的纠葛故事。

programme.title: 师兄撞鬼
programme.desc: 该片描述董骠调查制造毒品案，却惨死在毒贩枪下。董骠化做鬼魂回警察局，借警员周星驰之手查清杀己的凶手。冯淬帆和周星驰在茅山老祖的指导下利用灵药合力斗败邪恶法师，枪毙邓公子，为董骠报了仇，使他能安心上天堂。

programme.title: 夜守
programme.desc: 在一次车祸后失忆的王人杰找到夜间警卫的工作。午夜，他准时抵达废弃的大厦上班，却发现三只冤魂如约而至，并揭发了一场复仇计画。究竟这是命运的安排还是邪灵的诅咒？

programme.title: 神偷次世代
programme.desc: 四个神偷接到任务，要偷取一种刚研究成功的治癌药物。然而，当他们到达现场时，却遇到了埋伏。这时他们才意识到，这个任务原来是一场骗局。突然，一名神秘女子出现，她的手中掌握着能破解迷局的重要线索......

programme.title: 看不见的他们
programme.desc: 一场车祸后，林月家里怪事连连。全身冰冷的姐姐在镜子里看不见家人的身影，黑夜里爸爸窥探的双眼，和每天凌晨阁楼传来的弹珠声。林月循声而上去寻找真相，却在打开阁楼的门后，发现里面紧锁的是自己的遗像...

programme.title: 百变星君
programme.desc: 富家子李泽星挂名留学，实际上却挥金如土，并自命情圣，称霸校园。一日，因搭上黑帮老大情妇Silvia，而遭黑帮刺杀，被炸得粉身碎骨。这个财大气粗的李泽星以百变金刚之姿态复活，还掌握了独特的能力，得到一份真正的工作，还有他真心爱上的意中人。

programme.title: 头文字 D
programme.desc: 本片由日本同名殿堂级漫画改编而成。故事描述十八岁的拓海，每天驾驶着父亲残旧的汽车送递豆腐，却无意中练得一手出神入化的飘移技术。拓海被父亲怂恿参加山路赛，竟在众人错愕之下胜出，一夜成名，之后更面对一连串惊险绝伦的挑战赛！

programme.title: 靓足100分
programme.desc: 林天赐的富商祖父病重，欲将遗产留给他，但条件是天赐要在一个月内结婚，否则遗产将归祖父侄儿罗伯特。不久天赐邂逅乐小小，两人渐生情愫。罗伯特即派玛丽琳利用美人计破坏他俩的感情。不料玛丽琳贪图遗产，准备真的与林结婚。罗心有不甘，捣乱婚礼，并揭发她的计谋...

programme.title: 火云邪神之修罗面具
programme.desc: 十八年前，邪恶的黑羽会潜入了老邪神西城勇的地盘，盗走了修罗面具，而利用修罗面具放出当时只是个婴儿的魔神。老邪神为了魔神日后不作恶收养了婴儿，教他好好做人，成为小邪神。小邪神最后控制了面具的力量成为老邪神的接班人，继续守护城市。

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 猩猩王
programme.desc: 探险家陈正风（李修贤）受聘赴印度森林搜捕猩猩王，结果误堕娱乐公司老板鲁天（谷峰）的圈套，将猩猩王带往香港表演。同行的「女泰山」阿维（伊芙莲嘉）见猩猩王惨遭捉弄摆布，伤心之余更被鲁天意图强奸。猩猩王睹状狂性大发，追击鲁天至市区，市民一片慌乱，军警如临大敌...全片的特技道具，一丝不苟，猩猩王爬上香港当时最高建筑物康乐大厦的镜头，令观众惊异万分。导演远赴泰国森林取景，还有野性美丽的女泰山伊芙莲嘉演出，令人大饱眼福。

programme.title: 武状元苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏乞儿原为贵族，但因上京考武状元时作弊，被眨为乞儿。苏乞儿在机缘巧合下救了丐帮长老，并接任为新帮主。一天，皇上狩猎之时，差点被暗杀，幸苏乞儿及时救驾。皇帝欲恢复其官职时，苏乞儿却拒绝。其后，皇上御赐一个乞儿钵予苏乞儿，从此他过着愉快的行乞生活。

programme.title: 撞邪先生
programme.desc: 美容院职员曾小雨机缘巧合之下，认识了富豪之子利志，以为交上好运。岂料利志的父亲是茅山高人，在南洋大败一降头师时，被下咒绝子绝孙，让利志每次恋爱皆遭恶鬼破坏，无疾而终。小雨深爱利志，找大法师沈慈航帮助，授以五色驱邪带，两人顺利结婚。新婚之夜，利志遗失了驱邪彩带，果然恶鬼来犯...

programme.title: 风雨同路
programme.desc: 卧底探员张郎奉命接近前黑帮大哥李云飞，调查冷血匪帮首领大傻所涉及的钻石劫案，并借机套取线报。当交易出现意外后，钻石落入李云飞手中，大傻决心将两人置于死地。张郎与李云飞被迫联手反击。

programme.title: 再见七日情
programme.desc: 护卫员阿逊被派往保护富商的儿子，期间巧遇住在隔壁的祖儿，更渐渐爱上她，却发现原来祖儿是富商的情妇。当他俩的恋情被富商发现后，事情一发不可收拾！
