programme.desc: Tamika's tries to impress two popular older girls.

programme.title: Mini Mentors
programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.title: Too Cool For School
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Nothin' To It But To Do It
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: It's Like They Never Left!
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition's fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal - however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances.

programme.title: The Jonathan Gold Standard
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold's last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold's friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Forgeti
programme.desc: When Gwen drags Ben along on a hike in search of the legendary Forgeti - a yeti that makes people forget they ever saw it - Ben is dubious.

programme.title: The Filth
programme.desc: Ben is tasked with cleaning the Rust Bucket but is soon tricked into letting the villainous and vile Fly Guys steal it.

programme.title: Clown College
programme.desc: While tailgating at a State U. homecoming football game, Ben teams up with Grandpa Max's old college buddies to keep the crazy clown Zombozo from robbing the stadium blind at halftime.

programme.title: The Ring Leader
programme.desc: While winning big on a Sumo Slammers video game, Ben gets the idea to win a real wrestling match - until an intimidating wrestler named Iron Kyle decides to make it a true challenge.

programme.title: Take 10
programme.desc: While trying to film his own indie film, Ben accidentally lets the Bug Gang go free and when he takes the fight to their hidden lair, Ben has to take on their narcissistic leader - the Ant Queen.

programme.title: The Thrice Cream Man
programme.desc: When Chowder's love of thrice cream constantly disrupts work, Mung cooks up a way to break his sweet obsession.

programme.title: The Flibber-Flabber Diet
programme.desc: After Truffles feels like she's put on a little weight, she demands that the whole company go on a diet. It's a battle of wills to see if she can lose weight before they rest of them lose their minds.

programme.title: The Froggy Apple
programme.desc: If Chowder can survive making a very complicated dish, he's on his way to becoming a chef.

programme.title: Chowder's Girlfriend
programme.desc: When Panini sets her love-struck eyes on Chowder, he tries every trick he can think of to convince her he's not her boyfriend.

programme.title: Mahjongg Night
programme.desc: Chowder learns that messing with Truffles' game night means certain doom.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Half-Blood Prince
programme.desc: Harry Potter returns to Hogwarts for his sixth year - to face a growing danger that may be more than a match for his strengthening powers as a wizard.

programme.title: Ben 24hrs
programme.desc: Ben and Gwen attempt to stay up all night for Adrenaland but Ben fails to utilise his alien powers to stay awake and starts causing disaster after disaster.

programme.title: Freaky Gwen Ben
programme.desc: Ben interferes with malicious magician Hex's quest for the Titan Gloves at a flea market and accidentally switches bodies with Gwen, forcing him to walk a mile in her shoes and vice-versa!

programme.title: Rustbucket Rip
programme.desc: During a tour of historic Oldeville, Ben finds a rare Sumo Slammers card. When Billy Billions claims the same card, Ben has to battle Billy's high-tech drones which have hijacked the Rust Bucket!

programme.title: The Clocktopus
programme.desc: In a peaceful coastal town, Ben must not only face the archaic antagonist Steam Smythe and his latest creation - the Clocktopus - but also his deepest, darkest fear: squid!

programme.title: Growing Pains
programme.desc: During a stop at the superstore Shoppe, Ben and Gwen are transformed into babies by nanny-gone-nuts Nanny Nightmare, who will stop at nothing to reshape the world in the image of her day care.

programme.title: Stinky Love
programme.desc: Kimchi whisks one of Mung's smelliest dishes away to a romantic setting on top of the catering company.

programme.desc: In order to cook the performing food Sing Beans, the gang has to stay up all night as the dish cooks.

programme.desc: Chowder is forced to swallow his new gum before Truffles finds out he didn't buy enough to share. Soon all of Marzipan City ends up in a very sticky situation.

programme.title: Strokes Of Genius
programme.desc: Comedic superstars Ali Wong and Randall Park swing by the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire Challenge tasking the chefs to make the wackiest fried rice they can. Then, the chefs head to the famed Getty Museum to seek inspiration from one of four historical art movements to create a masterpiece on their plate. programme.desc: Over Hooker and Captain Sheridan's objections, Stacy agrees to be a decoy to catch a serial killer.

programme.title: The Mumbler
programme.desc: Hooker falls back on an old hobby of raising homing pigeons in order to get a young girl to help him bring down a gang of ruthless thieves targeting armored cars.

programme.title: Nicole
programme.desc: A seductive double agent (guest star Joan Collins) endangers a vital IMF project when Jim Phelps falls in love with her.

programme.title: Part 5
programme.desc: The series depicts the stories of Pompeii's citizens with the threat of Mount Vesuvius bringing chaos and destruction. Arbaces's machinations and the persecution of Christians add to the growing tension.

programme.title: Father Lode
programme.desc: Al finally comes into some money at the track, but hasn't time to enjoy his winnings - he's too busy hiding the loot from his family.

programme.title: Darrin on a Pedestal
programme.desc: A flirtation of Serena's turns Darrin to stone.

programme.title: Part 6
programme.desc: By 1780, Kunta accepts his fate, settles down and have a daughter. Several years later, she befriends Anne and secretly become best friends. But this will end up having unintended serious consequences later on.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: When it is discovered that a teenage girl is suffering from PTSD due to sexual abuse, all leads point to a billionaire. As the team continues to investigate, Kress involves his lawyer who throws the whole case awry.

programme.title: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: ALF ruins the Tanner family's weekend vacation by stowing away on the airplane, but when the pilot gets sick, ALF must fly the plane.

programme.title: Vengeance Is Mine
programme.desc: Hooker's old partner is determined to avenge the rape of his daughter after the suspect manages to avoid arrest.

programme.title: Sweet Sixteen and Dead
programme.desc: Hooker sets out to stop a drug and prostitution ringleader from preying on teenage runaways.

programme.title: Part 6
programme.desc: By 1780, Kunta accepts his fate, settles down and have a daughter. Several years later, she befriends Anne and secretly become best friends. But this will end up having unintended serious consequences later on.

programme.title: Father Lode
programme.desc: Al finally comes into some money at the track, but hasn't time to enjoy his winnings - he's too busy hiding the loot from his family.

programme.title: Darrin on a Pedestal
programme.desc: A flirtation of Serena's turns Darrin to stone.

programme.title: The Vault
programme.desc: Two criminals (including guest star Nehemia Persoff) loot a treasury to unseat a South American president.

programme.title: All In The Family
programme.desc: Al is less than thrilled when Peggy announces her family is coming for a visit - all six of them.

programme.title: Paul Revere Rides Again
programme.desc: Esmeralda's wacky witchcraft causes Paul Revere to ride again.

programme.title: Part 7
programme.desc: In 1806, Kunta's daughter Kizzy falls in love with a slave called Noah, who later tries to escape. But he is quickly caught and tortured until he names Kizzy as his accomplice, sealing her horrific fate.

programme.title: Part 6
programme.desc: The series depicts the stories of Pompeii's citizens with the threat of Mount Vesuvius bringing chaos and destruction. Arbaces's machinations and the persecution of Christians add to the growing tension.

programme.title: Spectacle
programme.desc: After the sexual assault of a young woman is videotaped and featured on a campus-wide intranet feed, the detectives go in search of the victim and her attacker.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrely Whirly
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: A Dog For Dora / Super Pozole
programme.desc: Dora gets a new puppy that makes her cat Lucky jealous. After he runs away, Dora tracks Lucky down to remind him of how loved he is. / Today is the championship game, but all of Dora's friends have a cold. Dora helps them feel better in time to play!

programme.title: Dora's Song For Papi / Pirate Piggies
programme.desc: Dora travels across the rainforest, creating a song for her dad so they can celebrate Papi-Dora day!/Dora is ready for the Churro Fiesta when the Pirate Piggies eat all the churros. Dora tracks down a treasure chest of golden churros to save the day!

programme.title: The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: Let Justice Be done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: The Grass is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel Elevator / The Crew Builds A Popcorn-Cat Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew steps in to help at Hotel Hadley after a snowy surprise. But when the stairs aren't fast enough, it's time to bow wow build! // Cafe Carl adopted kittens! But when they cause popcorn pandemonium, Rubble & Crew make the cafe cat-friendly

programme.title: Pups Leave Marshall Home Alone / Pups Save the Deer
programme.desc: With the other pups at parachute training, Marshall must get a group of loose kittens back all by himself. But he has the help of the other pups' packs! // Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a family of deer stuck on slippery ice!

programme.title: Pups Save the Parrot / Pups Save the Queen Bee
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend Carlos find his lost parrot, Mateo! // When the PAW Patrol discovers a beehive in Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse, Ryder and the pups must work together to find the bees a new home.

programme.title: Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Nebulator
programme.desc: Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure.

programme.title: Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: Spaceland
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bowling Alley / The Crew Builds A Superbloom Path
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: The Crew Celebrates Builder Covegiving Day / The Crew Builds A Rocket Ship Ride
programme.desc: After Speed Meister sabotages Builder Covegiving Day, it's up to the pups to save the holiday for everyone in Builder Cove. // Mix dreams about giving the moon a Mix makeover. Rubble and the pups make her dream a reality with a new boardwalk ride!

programme.title: Big Red Chicken Wake Up! / The Mystery Gift
programme.desc: Dora and Boots have to wake up the Big Red Chicken before he floats over a waterfall! // Dora and friends must solve a series of questions and challenges to open a mysterious gift.

programme.title: The Great Space Race
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world! Along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship!

programme.title: Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thesee", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Super Wheels vs. Pancakeio
programme.desc: When Pancakeio the Pancake Wizard takes all the pancakes in Axle City, it's up to Blaze, Stripes, and Starla to become superheroes! Using their Super Wheels, they've got to get those pancakes back- just in time for breakfast!

programme.title: Valentine's Day Rescue
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day! But when Zeg, Darington and Starla get lost on their way to the Valentine's Day party, it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue them.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: Pups Save a Lonesome Walrus / Pups Save the Hummy Gummies
programme.desc: Wally the Walrus searches all over Adventure Bay for Cap'n Turbot and turns the town upside-down in the process. // Everybody loves Helga Humdinger's Hummy Gummy treats, causing Mayor Humdinger to get jealous and steal them all.

programme.title: Rubble and Wild and a Yarn Ball!/Skye and Rory Flip It/Marshall, Leo and a Ferris Wheel/Everest
programme.desc: Rubble & Wild rescue animals from a giant runaway ball of yarn. // Skye and Rory rescue a painter hanging from a scaffold. // Marshall & Leo rescue animals stuck on a Ferris Wheel.// Everest and Shade rescue a baby mountain goat stuck in a crevasse.

programme.title: Croc-A-Bye Baby / Wanna Eampanada? / If The Boot Fits / Pinata Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: Spaceland
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: New Rocket
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to come along to her relaxation class to help her unwind.

programme.title: Parking Ticket
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig gets a parking ticket Peppa and George learn that adults have rules just like children.

programme.title: Father's Day
programme.desc: Peppa and George take it upon themselves to make this Father's Day the best Father's Day ever.

programme.title: Funny Music
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a new synthesiser. Peppa, George and Mummy Pig have fun finding and sampling different sounds from around the house!

programme.title: The Panda Twins
programme.desc: Police Officer Panda brings his twin daughters Peggi and Pandora Panda to playgroup for the first time.

programme.title: Chinese New Year
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children about Chinese New Year and together they make a wonderful dragon costume..

programme.title: Lots of Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: Peppa and her family spend the day jumping in different types of puddles, but Peppa thinks one type is still the best puddle in the world!

programme.title: Mandy Mouse
programme.desc: There is a new friend at Peppa's playgroup - Mandy Mouse. Mandy has a wheelchair, is very sporty and loves to play games.

programme.title: Recorders
programme.desc: The children have a music lesson with Madame Gazelle and all learn how to play the recorder.

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Robots to the Rescue
programme.desc: When three big emergencies turn out to be too much for one truck alone, Blaze turns himself and his friends into super strong robots to save Axle City from a runaway train, an overflowing glue factory, and an erupting volcano!

programme.title: T-Rex Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are in Dinosaur Valley, showing off their amazing robot powers to their dinosaur friends. But when they discover three lost little Tyrannosauruses, they must use their robot powers to get the babies home safely.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: Pups Save Floating Friends / Pups Save a Satellite
programme.desc: The alien's spaceship is on the fritz and shooting out anti-gravity rays. Ryder and the pups need to repair the spaceship. // A satellite is out of orbit and falling towards Adventure Bay, the PAW patrol must fix it before it crash lands.

programme.title: Pups Save the Jungle Penguins / Pups Save a Freighter
programme.desc: An ice floe carrying three penguins lands in the jungle. Now the pups must get them back to their frosty home. // Daring Danny is locked out of the lighthouse Turbot left him to look after. Now a freighter is headed straight for Seal Island!

programme.title: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: The Missing Magical Instruments / Mr. Banana's Big Puppet Show
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Vicky the Vicuna track down missing magic instruments to save Cloud Kingdom! // Dora rescues Boots' special banana puppet before the Golden Monkeys can get to it!

programme.title: Dora & Diego Rescue Baby Jaguar / Diego's Awesome Owl Adventure
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego rescue a baby jaguar after it gets lost deep in the rainforest. // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a baby burrowing owl find its parents and make it home.

programme.title: Polly's Holiday
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet, Polly Parrot comes to stay. Peppa and George love Polly Parrot. She is very funny and repeats everything anyone says. When Polly flies away, no one knows how to get her back, until George comes up with a very clever plan.

programme.title: Windy Autumn Day
programme.desc: It is a cold and windy day. At the park, all the leaves have turned red and yellow. It is so windy that Peppa's ball blows into the pond and George's hat blows into a tree.

programme.title: Mysteries
programme.desc: The family is watching "Detective Potato" on TV. Peppa and George want to be detectives too. So,Daddy Pig gives them a mystery to solve. Teddy is hidden and Peppa and George use a magnifying glass to follow a trail of cake crumbs to solve the mystery

programme.title: Bubbles
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing with bubbles. When the bubble mixture runs out, Daddy Pig shows them how to make really big bubbles with an old tennis racket and soapy water. Then he makes a big, muddy, bubbly puddle for everyone to jump up and down in.

programme.title: Bedtime
programme.desc: It's nearly time for bed and Peppa and George are called in for their bath. After that, they brush their teeth and get into bed. Soon they are fast asleep. Mummy and Daddy Pig finally sit down, but it's been a long day and they are very sleepy too.

programme.title: The Traffic Jam
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig have invited Peppa and her family to lunch. On the way, Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig get caught in a very long traffic jam, so Grandpa Pig decides to bring the lunch to them.

programme.title: Rock Pools
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig take Peppa and George to a beach with lots of rocks and little rock pools to explore. They all have fun with a little crab, a seashell and a fossil. Peppa rescues a little fish in her bucket and puts it back in the sea.

programme.title: Babysitting Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are helping their friend Stripes look after some baby animals, when the little critters accidentally float away on big bubbles. Now, it's up to these three babysitters to find their adorable animal friends and save the day!

programme.title: Pups Save Alex's Mini-Patrol / Pups Save a Lost Tooth
programme.desc: Impressed by the Paw Patrol's rescues, Alex sets up his own mini-Patrol, recruitng Chickaletta, Cali, Turtle, and Bunny. // Alex loses his first tooth, then really loses it.The tooth must be located before the Tooth Fairy comes!

programme.title: Pups Save a Magic Trick
programme.desc: When a magic trick goes awry, the Adventure Bay Easter Festival is overrun by wild bunnies.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Art Museum
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum!

programme.title: Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto "finders, keepers" a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: The Barbamartians
programme.desc: While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: Mr Scarecrow
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: The Time Capsule
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: Teddy's Day Out
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: Emily Elephant
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: It's Only a Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: Zeg and the Egg
programme.desc: Zeg is out smashing things with Blaze and AJ when he finds a tiny dinosaur egg. Now the three friends must embark on an epic journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: Pups Solve a Snap-N-Wrap Problem / Pups Save Helga and the Dingers
programme.desc: Before Chickaletta's playdate with Baby Yukiko, Mayor Goodway baby-proofs the playground, wrapping everything in rubbery Snap-N-Wrap. // Mayor Humdinger loses his voice on the day of the Annual Adventure Bay Sing-Off

programme.title: Pups Save Francois the Penguin
programme.desc: Francois and a baby penguin get caught on the other side of a carvasse.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Hotel / The Crew Builds A Hiking Trail
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's cousin Hadley comes to visit. But will Hadley approve of the new hotel?// After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: Abuela's Quinceanera / Story Time
programme.desc: Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: Run Cynthia Run / Dora In Space
programme.desc: Dora and Boots get help from Carmelo the Condor to fix their friend's running shoes in time for the rainforest race! // Dora and Boots rescue Tico from space after his spaceship falls apart!

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunt / Going into the Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: Hiccupism / Silence please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Sea Wall
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Super Mega Movie Screen / The Crew Builds An Auntie Day Present
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: Pups Save an Elephant Family / Pups and the Mischievous Kittens
programme.desc: The pups' road trip through the savanna becomes a mission to reunite and rescue an elephant family! // To win the Spotless Town award, the PAW Patrol pups must save Adventure Bay from Mayer Humdinger's Kitten Catastrophe Crew!

programme.title: Pups Save a Friend / Pups Save a Stowaway
programme.desc: When Marshall decides to take a break from the PAW Patrol, the pups jump into action to bring him back! // When the pups find a stowaway on their trip to the Icy Tundra, they must rescue a run-away kitty on a run-away Snow Cat!

programme.title: Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: New Rocket
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: The Crew Raises A Runway / The Crew Builds A Giant Skateboard
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble & Crew know just what to build // Rubble & Crew build a supersized skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show. But when it rolls out of control, the pups lead the chase!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Post Office / The Crew Builds A Super Farm Animal Wash
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office! But when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution. // Rubble & Crew use their construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's sticky farm animals.

programme.title: Friendaversary Adventure / Swiper's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.title: Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line!

programme.title: Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Flying Robot Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher's robot sends Crusher and Pickle far-far away, it's up to Robot Blaze and Robot Sparkle to rescue them using coding!

programme.title: The Ice Treasure
programme.desc: After discovering an ice road that leads to a giant ice treasure, Blaze, AJ, Watts and Gabby go an adventure to find out what's inside! But to get to the treasure, they'll have to dodge all of Crusher's chilly cheats along the way!

programme.title: The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Roller Coaster/The Crew Builds Motor A Play Space
programme.desc: When Speed Meister's rollercoaster sends a pet playdate out of control, Rubble & Crew save the day with a bigger, better, and safer coaster. // The Bark Yard safety inspection is today! But will Motor go boom and cost the Crew a gold safety star?

programme.title: Pups Stop a Big Leak/Pups Save a Baby Anteater/Pups Save a Hatch Day/Pups Save the Munchie Mobile
programme.desc: The Pups rescue Francois from a water tower geyser. // The Pups rescue a baby anteater stuck on a bucking RoboHorse. // The Pups rescue Ace and her special delivery for Chickaletta's party. // The Pups rescue Mr. Porter and his stranded Food Truck.

programme.title: Liberty Makes a New Friend / Pups Save the Pup Pup Boogie Contest
programme.desc: Liberty mistakenly brings a bear into town, thinking it's someone's pet. She must fix her mistake and rescue Chickaletta. // Francois' hot-air balloon goes out of control before the Pup Pup Boogie Contest. The Pups, with Liberty, race to the rescue.

programme.title: Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: The Great Abuela Cookoff
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off.

programme.title: Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: Muddy Festival
programme.desc: Peppa and her family sleep overnight in a tent and wake up to find the whole festival is covered in mud. Peppa is thrilled!

programme.title: Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Birthday
programme.desc: It is Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a special birthday meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: Buttercups, Daisies and Dandelions
programme.desc: Cousin Chloe, Peppa and George are picking flowers, making daisy-chains and transforming George into a fearsome dandy-lion.

programme.title: The Marble Run
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Rebecca and Richard Rabbit have so much fun playing with their marble run. When Daddy Pig joins in, the marble run gets much bigger!

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Metal Detector
programme.desc: When George loses his new toy robot's metal key, Grandpa Pig uses his metal detector to find it. They also find a lot of other things on the way!

programme.title: World Book Day
programme.desc: It is World Book Day at playgroup but Peppa has so many favourite books she just cannot decide which to go as!

programme.title: Children's Festival
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy go on a trip to the children's festival where there is lots of singing, dancing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: Meatball Mayhem
programme.desc: When Crusher accidentally knocks a bottle of "grow spice" onto a meatball, it grows to an enormous size and rolls away! It's up to Blaze and Pickle to transform into robots and stop the meatball before it wrecks the entire town!

programme.title: Robots in Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bowling Alley / The Crew Builds A Superbloom Path
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: Pups Save a Blimp / Pups Save a Chili Cook-Out
programme.desc: Capn' Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger who plans ot use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom. // Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the Chilli cook-off.

programme.title: Pups Save a Melon Festival / Pups Save A Cow
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the giant melon contest goes off the rails when his "melon" bounces away, causing chaos all over town! // When Farmer Al's truck gets stuck on a broken bridge, it's up to the pups to lower them to safety!

programme.title: Greedyguts / Where is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Barbabright Has a Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Dora And Diego and the Big Boy Bears! / Journey to Lizard Island
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami! // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a lost, baby lizard get home to its parents!

programme.title: The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: Teddy's Day Out
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: Emily Elephant
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: Mr Scarecrow
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: The Time Capsule
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: Recycling
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: Abra-Ka-Pickle!
programme.desc: Pickle is putting on a magic show for all of Axle City! But when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends! Abra-ka-Pickle!

programme.title: Pups Save Apollo / Pups Save the Hippos
programme.desc: Apollo the Super Pup comes to Adventure Bay, in Rubble's dream. The pups must rescue their super hero! // Raimundo's dancing hippos shake, rattle, and roll the big top down. The Paw Patrol rebuild just in time for the big show!

programme.title: Pups Save a Rubble-Double
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help.

programme.title: The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: Cluc Croc / One Tree Home
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: 1-TO-11
programme.desc: Known simply as 'The Yak,' Yakubu takes on 1-to-11, selecting his ultimate lineup from the best players he shared the pitch with. A powerhouse striker with 95 Premier League goals across spells at Portsmouth, Middlesbrough, Everton, and Blackburn, he reflects on the teammates who made the biggest impression during his career. Expect a team full of strength, flair, and goalscoring pedigree.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 多情城市

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 健康2.0
programme.desc: 您对自己的身体了解多少？怎么样吃才能吃出健康和美丽？网络上的健康秘方到底是真是假？主持人郑凯云、江坤俊医师与韦汝将为您的健康把关！

programme.title: 女人我最大
programme.desc: 《女人我最大》节目内容包罗万象，从各行各业的奇特文化；社会异象到生活新鲜事，美艳的主持人蓝心湄将带领观众一起探讨及解开谜团。

programme.title: 地球黄金线
programme.desc: 「地球黄金线」首创专业汽车实境秀，提共最实用的市售车评比、最深入的汽车经典赏析、最夯的车坛趋势，解析汽车科新风貌。

programme.title: 食尚玩家 疯狂总部
programme.desc: 节目设下最疯狂的任务，主持群将进行任务解锁，品尝在地美食。

programme.title: 国民大会
programme.desc: 「国民大会」从台湾的人、台湾的事，畅谈台湾的故事，以深入浅出，轻松幽默的不同面向解读社会时事的氛围。

programme.title: FOCUS全球新闻
programme.desc: 聚焦全球大事，从华府到北京，从欧美到亚非，从政治、经济到科技与文化，透过深度而完整的报导，带领观众进入关键事件的核心，补给面向世界的知识能量，掌握国际发展趋势。

programme.title: 最前线新闻
programme.desc: 报导每日全球与当地重大新闻。
